_comment: USD per 1,000,000 tokens. Cache write 5m = input x1.25, write 1h = input x2, read = input x0.1. Edit freely or override with --pricing <file>.
_match: Each key is matched as a substring of the model id (e.g. 'claude-opus-4-8' contains 'opus'). The longest (most specific) matching key wins, so key order does not matter.
